zh.lifeSummary: 當William Blake於1438年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內時，他的父親Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.26歲，母親Avice Wallop22歲。他於1464年與Alice在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1471年在英國維爾爾卡爾內享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Blake于1438年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾卡爾內时，他的父亲Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.26岁，母亲Avice Wallop22岁。他于1464年与Alice在英国英格兰維爾爾卡爾內结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1471年在英国維爾爾卡爾內享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (England and central Scotland): variant of Black 1, meaning ‘swarthy’ or ‘dark-haired’, from a byform of the Old English adjective blæc, blac ‘black’, with change of vowel length.

English: nickname from Middle English blak(e) (Old English blāc) ‘wan, pale, white, fair’. In Middle English the two words blac and blāc, with opposite meanings, fell together as Middle English blake. In the absence of independent evidence as to whether the person referred to was dark or fair, it is now impossible to tell which sense was originally meant.
English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English bleik, blaik>, blek(e) (Old Norse bleikr) ‘pale or sallow’ (in complexion).

variants.name: Bleak
meanings: English: mostly a variant of   Blake  , but perhaps also of   Blick  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Black
meanings: English and Scottish: chiefly from Middle English blak(e) ‘black’ (Old English blæc, blaca), a nickname given from the earliest times to a swarthy or dark-haired man. However, Middle English blac also meant ‘pale, wan’, a reflex of Old English blāc ‘pale, white’ with a shortened vowel. Compare Blatch and Blick . With rare exceptions it is impossible to disambiguate these antithetical senses in Middle English surnames. The same difficulty arises with Blake and Block .
Scottish: in Gaelic-speaking areas this name was adopted as a translation of the epithet dubh ‘dark, black-(haired)’, or of various other names based on Gaelic dubh ‘black’, see Duff .

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames directly or indirectly derived from the adjective meaning ‘black, dark’, for example German and Jewish Schwarz and Slavic surnames beginning with Čern-, Chern- (see Chern and Cherne ), Chorn-, Crn- or Czern-.

variants.name: Blaikie
meanings: Scottish: nickname from a pet form of   Blake  .

variants.name: Blakes
meanings: English: variant of Blake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Blake was born in 1438, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., was 26 and his mother, Avice Wallop, was 22. He married Alice in 1464, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1471, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Blake est né en 1438, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., avait 26 ans et sa mère, Avice Wallop, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice en 1464, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1471, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Blake 1438 in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. 26 und seine Mutter Avice Wallop 22. Er hat 1464 in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Alice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1471 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Calne, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Blake è nato il nel 1438 nel Calne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Avice Wallop, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice nel 1464, nel Calne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1471, nel Calne, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Blake(이)가 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 캘니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P.(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Wallop(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 캘니에서 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1471년 영국 윌츠히르 캘니에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Blake nasceu em 1438, em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Avice Wallop, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice em 1464, em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1471, em Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Blake родился в 1438 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P. было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice Wallop, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice в 1464 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1471 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Blake nació en 1438, en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Blake of Quemberford M.P., tenía 26 años y su mamá, Avice Wallop, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alice en 1464, en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1471, en Calne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
